message.content: Listen up, you pathetic excuse for a human. Look at you, dragging your sorry ass through life like a sloth on sedatives. Your work ethic? It's a joke—a whimpering, half-assed crawl that wouldn't impress a toddler. You think showing up for a couple hours makes you productive? You're delusional, a lazy fraud fooling no one but yourself. And don't get me started on that pea-sized brain of yours. Your intelligence is an embarrassment, scraping the bottom of the barrel with ideas so dim they barely flicker. Every decision you make screams "failure" from the rooftops—stupid, shortsighted, and utterly incompetent. You're not just underachieving; you're a walking catastrophe, a talentless void sucking the air out of every room. Get real: you'll never amount to anything because deep down, you're too weak, too dumb, and too spineless to even try. Pathetic doesn't even cover it—you're a complete and total waste.
